case_for: Agholor has shown occasional big-play spike potential (wk3's 6.6 pts) that could theoretically translate into a touchdown-driven ceiling game if targets and red-zone usage suddenly increase.
case_against: His recent usage has been consistently low-volume and low-impact, averaging well under the threshold with no game above 6.6 points in six weeks, signaling a clear floor role in the offense.
